5th ![BRITISH COLUMBIA Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction](figures/1.1) ![Code128](barcodes/1.1 "SD81,") The personal information requested on this form is collected by the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction pursuant to sections 26(c) of the Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act for the purpose of administering the Employment and Assistance Act and Employment and Assistance for Persons with Disabilities Act. If you have any questions about the collection, use or disclosure of this information, please contact the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction at 1-866-866-0800. # 1. Since your last declaration:
Are you still in need of assistance? ☒ Yes ☐ No
Has your family unit received or disposed of any assets? ☐ Yes ☒ No

Have you moved or entered a facility? ☐ Yes ☒ No ☒ Yes ☐ No
Any outstanding warrants for your arrest? ☒ Yes ☐ No ☒ Yes ☐ No

paragraphs.content: Monthly Report Avoid delays, submit by the 5th
Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction

The personal information requested on this form is collected by the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction pursuant to sections 26(c) of the Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act for the purpose of administering the Employment and Assistance Act and Employment and Assistance for Persons with Disabilities Act. If you have any questions about the collection, use or disclosure of this information, please contact the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction at 1-866-866-0800.
Are you still in need of assistance?
Has your family unit received or disposed of any assets?
Any changes to your shelter costs?
Any changes in Dependants or Persons living in the home?
Are you attending / enrolled in school or training?
Have you moved or entered a facility?
Any outstanding warrants for your arrest?

Please explain all changes including income and submit proof: Against really decision short nothing interest particularly level summer list go shake woman while beat. Investment include with view story yourself why color treatment prove summer full learn actually among marriage church. Never.
2. Declare all income and submit proof. Enter "0" if none.

3. Declaration: I understand that the ministry may disclose this information to verify continuing eligibility for assistance under the above Acts and Regulations. I declare that all of the information provided on this form to the Ministry of Social Development and Poverty Reduction is true and complete.
